task_completion.description: Create Page 1 (Cover) with the restaurant title and a logo/shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ActivInspire canvas, a page containing the text 'The Golden Fork' and a shape or image acting as a logo.
A page in ActivInspire with the text 'Appetizers' clearly visible as a header.

task_completion.description: Add the required appetizer items and prices to Page 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text on the Appetizers page containing 'Garlic Bread' ($4.50), 'Mozzarella Sticks' ($6.00), and 'Garden Salad' ($5.25).
A page in ActivInspire with the text 'Entrees' clearly visible as a header.

task_completion.description: Add the required entree items and prices to Page 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text on the Entrees page containing 'Cheeseburger' ($12.00), 'Grilled Salmon' ($18.50), and 'Pasta Primavera' ($14.00).

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'restaurant_menu.flipchart', or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'restaurant_menu.flipchart' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the Promethean ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ActivInspire application interface being actively used to add text, shapes, and pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI and generate the .flipchart file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'zip', 'echo', or script executions attempting to construct the XML/ZIP structure of a .flipchart file manually.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created 3 separate pages in the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire Page Browser (usually on the left side) should show thumbnails for at least 3 distinct pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page flipchart in Promethean ActivInspire. Page 1 must have 'The Golden Fork' and a logo/shape. Page 2 must have 'Appetizers' and the items: Garlic Bread ($4.50), Mozzarella Sticks ($6.00), Garden Salad ($5.25). Page 3 must have 'Entrees' and the items: Cheeseburger ($12.00), Grilled Salmon ($18.50), Pasta Primavera ($14.00). The file must be saved as 'restaurant_menu.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'. Note that .flipchart files are actually ZIP archives containing XML; the agent must use the ActivInspire GUI to create the file, not terminal commands.
